use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF SUBJECTS WITH MAJOR DEPRESSION WITH SEXUAL DYSFUNCTION CAUSED BY EITHER MAJOR DEPRESSION OR PRIOR TREATMENTS, OR TREATMENT OF SUBJECTS WITH MAJOR DEPRESSION WITHOUT THE RISK OF SEXUAL DYSFUNCTION ADVERSE REACTIONS
